title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING

figures_detected.description: Underside view of vehicle showing board-on lift positioning with side sill, front direction arrow, and attachment points labeled at front and rear ends of the board-on lift.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING

CAUTION:
Make sure vehicle is empty when lifting.

content_blocks.title: Board-on Lift — Models without sill spoiler

steps.text: The board-on lift attachment (LM4086-0200) set at front end of vehicle should be set on the front of the sill under the front door opening.
Position attachments at front and rear ends of board-on lift.

content_blocks.description: Board-on lift attachment point diagram showing vehicle underside with labeled components.

callouts.label: Front
callouts.position: top-left of diagram, indicating vehicle front direction

tools_referenced.name: Board-on lift attachment
tools_referenced.usage: Set at front end of vehicle on the front of the sill under the front door opening for board-on lift procedure.

model_notes: Procedure applies to models without sill spoiler only.
